description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. She is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted dress with a distinct two-tone design: the upper portion is form-fitting and the lower portion is a short skirt. Her footwear consists of high-heeled sandals with ankle straps, adding to her formal or semi-formal appearance. Her hair is styled in a neat bun at the back of her head, with no visible accessories or carried items. The facial features are neutral, and the overall posture is relaxed but alert, suitable for an urban environment.
description: A standing adult woman in a sleeveless, two-tone dress and high-heeled sandals, with her hair in a bun and arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fitted sleeveless dress, facial features, and high-heeled sandals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the dress, the bun hairstyle, and the heel height.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress, the bun hairstyle, and the back of the sandals.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the dress profile, arm position, and the bun hairstyle.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted dress with a short skirt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: hair styled in a neat bun
